title: AI Tintype Portrait
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a 19th-century tintype portrait. Preserve recognizable identity, facial structure, expression, pose, camera angle, and framing. Use monochrome silver-gray toning, shallow antique lens softness, metal-plate texture, subtle scratches, formal historical portrait lighting, and restrained vintage styling while keeping the subject identifiable. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: color, text, captions, logos, watermarks, changed identity, different age, extra people, distorted face, malformed hands, duplicate limbs, modern glossy look, heavy blur, low quality, cartoon, illustration, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. antique metal plate portrait, formal studio pose...
